violations.text: The ceiling in the ware-washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the under the 3-bay sink and food prep sink do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024
The ceiling in the ware-washing and front prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024
